clue_chain_pattern.description: Physical trace on a vessel → placement discrepancy identifying who could have touched it → motive callback tying culprit to the specific vessel.

stages.prompt: A physical trace of the substance appears on a specific vessel (glass, decanter, teacup).
A witness describes seeing the vessel handled at a time or place that contradicts one suspect's stated location.
A written record (letter, ledger, receipt) ties the access-holding suspect to a specific motive against the victim.

steps.prompt: Vesper names the room and the vessel.
For each player, name the clue they almost caught.
Vesper credits the culprit's best deception move.
One small line naming the vessel and the culprit.
